lessons.title: Sous Vide Cooking
lessons.description: Learn the technique of sous vide cooking, including temperature control and timing.
steps: Seal the ingredients in a bag.
Set the sous vide machine to the desired temperature.
Finish with a sear if desired.
safety_notes: Ensure proper sealing to avoid water ingress.
Monitor cooking times to avoid overcooking.

lessons.title: Fermentation Basics
lessons.description: Understand the basics of fermentation and how to create fermented foods like yogurt and pickles.
steps: Add the starter culture if needed.
Seal and store in a warm place for fermentation.
Taste and store in the fridge once fermented.
safety_notes: Use clean equipment to prevent unwanted bacteria.
Monitor for any signs of spoilage.
